title: Implement local AW instructions and closeout residue normalization

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1061 and #1062 together: ship managed local instructions under .agentic-workspace and normalize closeout/archive residue so prepared archives do not keep scaffold placeholders.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Use command-owned planning mutations for the execplan; keep root startup behavior intact; preserve hard closeout blockers while normalizing only deterministic scaffold residue.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Choose the smallest lifecycle helper and closeout normalization patch that satisfies the issues, plus focused tests for default and configured instruction filenames.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Add managed .agentic-workspace local instruction generation and status checks, add closeout normalization for scaffold residue, then validate focused and workspace suites.
canonical_core.proof_expectations: ['uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_start_preflight_cli.py::<focused lifecycle tests> packages/planning/tests/test_archive.py::<focused closeout tests> -q', 'make test-workspace', 'make test-planning', 'make lint-workspace', 'make lint-planning', 'uv run agentic-workspace summary --target . --verbose --format json', 'uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json']
canonical_core.completion_criteria: ['#1061: init/upgrade/status/doctor create or verify a managed .agentic-workspace/<configured agent instructions file> that tells agents to prefer CLI commands and avoid hand-editing structured state when commands exist.', '#1062: archive-plan --prepare-closeout normalizes deterministic scaffold residue in retained archives instead of leaving pending/not_checked placeholders for proof, delegation, improvement review, and canonical closeout fields.']
